name: Nothing for Dinner I.e.s.jjgf65a
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook linguine in boiling water until al dente.
2. While the pasta cooks, make the sauce. Heat olive oil in a skillet and add minced garlic. Saute garlic for 1 minute.
3. Add drained clams (save the juice) and chopped artichoke hearts to the clam mixture with olives. If desired, add the marinade from the artichokes as well.
4. Allow the sauce to simmer uncovered until the pasta is done.
5. Drain the linguine and toss it with the sauce, adding salt and red pepper flakes to taste.
6. Sprinkle freshly grated cheese over each serving.
